location: NOT OBTAINABLE IN THE BASE GAME. This is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content, found inside Taylew's Ruined Forge, a dungeon just north of the Ancient Ruins Base Site of Grace in the Rauh Ancient Ruins (Land of Shadow). Climb the stone pillar near the entrance, jump right through a doorway, then follow the ramp up to a platform where the shield lies on a corpse.
region: Rauh Ancient Ruins (Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — not a base-game region)

source.name: Corpse on upper platform, Taylew's Ruined Forge

tactics: Flag for the data owner: base/small-shields.json lists this as base-game content, but wiki.gg and Fextralife both confirm it's exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC with no base-game source — the same misfile pattern previously found with the Golem Fist.
Taylew's Ruined Forge is populated by Golem Smiths and Lava Slimes; an enemy perched on the ceiling near the shield can ambush you if you don't look up first.
Its unique Discus Hurl skill throws the shield like a spinning projectile, giving it a ranged option rather than pure blocking.
Requires investment across four stats (Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Faith) to use effectively, unusually broad for a Small Shield.
lore: A roundshield etched with smithing script, crafted as a throwing weapon through the same arcane smithing arts used to make the other Smithscript armaments.

builds.name: Quadruple-stat hybrid thrower
builds.why: Spread D/E scaling across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Faith combined with the ranged Discus Hurl skill suits an unusual hybrid build wanting a throwable off-hand rather than a standard block shield.
